dataset: NCEP Reanalysis Derived Surface Air Temperature (air.mon.ltm.nc)

pi_items.source: Explicitly required in setup_task.sh briefing instructions and expected by export_result.sh.

Python array math on the NCEP air.mon.ltm.nc dataset shows the maximum July - January temperature difference is 53.14 degrees, cleanly inside the 45-65 bounds.
Python array math on the NCEP air.mon.ltm.nc dataset shows the maximum July - January temperature difference is 53.14 degrees, cleanly inside the 45-65 bounds.

Python array math on the NCEP air.mon.ltm.nc dataset confirms the 53.14 degrees peak difference is located at 65.0N, 127.5E, corresponding to the Sakha Republic (Yakutia) in Siberia, Russia (Asia/Eurasia).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a continentality index map using real NCEP Reanalysis surface air temperature monthly mean data downloaded directly from NOAA. Independent array math analysis confirms that subtracting the January array from the July array produces a maximum difference of approximately 53.14 degrees. This peak value falls correctly inside the 45 to 65 scoring threshold. This peak occurs at coordinates 65.0N, 127.5E, which corresponds geographically to the Sakha Republic (Yakutia) in Siberia, Russia, validating the region keywords ('Siberia', 'Russia', 'Asia', 'Eurasia'). The exact output paths for the map and report are explicitly enforced in the task briefing document.
